title: Arlong’s Rule Tightens Around Nami
scene: On pages 21–24, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Nami’s role with Arlong becomes harder to understand as loyalty, fear, and survival overlap.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gen, we need to get you treated.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No, I'm fine. I can manage on my own. Sorry for all the trouble I've caused, everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What're you talking about? You're not the one at fault here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's right. As if anybody could abide all their irrational rules!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But who was that guy earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Do you know him, Gen?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No... can't say I do...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: long time no see, everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Nami...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: NA-CHAN...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I've got

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: to think that you of all people would decide to stroll through the middle of town...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh nothing, just curious what all the ruckus I heard was about.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Guess it was Arlong...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Only 7 million belli left...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: you're as infamous as ever.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Well, I AM a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But Arlong knows what's what.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: He knows money can get anything done.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: So it'll only be a little more until his promise!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: No matter what, I'm going to raise 100 million belli,

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyasi villagers
dialogue.text: So I can buy this village!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Even if she tells me to leave,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I don't have anything to do outside of here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: After all,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I promised Luffyy to bring her back...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Jeez...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: seems like I've got myself tied up in a complicated mess...

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
